summary.headline: Bunge initiates exchange offers for Viterra's debt in connection with pending acquisition.
summary.narrative_summary: Bunge Global SA initiated exchange offers and consent solicitations to replace existing Viterra Limited notes with new Bunge-issued notes as part of its pending acquisition.

ma_or_capital_allocation.description: Bunge's wholly-owned subsidiary, Bunge Limited Finance Corp., commenced offers to exchange existing Viterra notes for new Bunge-issued notes.

extraction_notes: Numbers from Exhibit 99.1; cover sheet only had Item references
